div.class: search-input-container search-with-dialog position-relative d-flex flex-row flex-items-center height-auto color-bg-transparent border-0 color-fg-subtle mx-0

modal-dialog.h1: Search code, repositories, users, issues, pull requests...

div.class: search-suggestions position-absolute width-full color-shadow-large border color-fg-default color-bg-default overflow-hidden d-flex flex-column query-builder-container

button.class: Button Button--iconOnly Button--invisible Button--medium mr-1 tmp-mr-1 px-2 tmp-px-2 py-0 tmp-py-0 d-flex flex-items-center rounded-1 color-fg-muted

div.class: d-flex flex-row color-fg-muted tmp-px-3 text-small color-bg-default search-feedback-prompt

button.class: Button--link Button--medium Button color-fg-accent text-normal ml-2 tmp-ml-2

form.p: We read every piece of feedback, and take your input very seriously.

input.name: include_email
input.aria-label: Include my email address so I can be contacted
input.label: Include my email address so I can be contacted

div.h2: Use saved searches to filter your results more quickly

input.name: custom_scope_id
input.p: To see all available qualifiers, see our documentation.

You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session.
You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session.

button.class: Button Button--iconOnly Button--invisible Button--medium flash-close js-flash-close

div.a: Open in a new github.dev tab

div.class: d-flex flex-column border rounded-2 tmp-mb-3 pl-1

a.aria-label: View commit history for this file.

footer.class: footer tmp-pt-7 tmp-pb-6 f6 color-fg-muted color-border-subtle p-responsive

div.class: d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center flex-column-reverse flex-lg-row flex-wrap flex-lg-nowrap

ul.class: list-style-none d-flex flex-justify-center flex-wrap mb-2 mb-lg-0

button.class: Link--secondary underline-on-hover border-0 p-0 color-bg-transparent text-left

cookie-consent-link.button: Do not share my personal information

div.div: You can’t perform that action at this time.

details.class: details-reset details-overlay details-overlay-dark lh-default color-fg-default hx_rsm

details-dialog.class: Box Box--overlay d-flex flex-column anim-fade-in fast hx_rsm-dialog hx_rsm-modal
